name: Magic school RP
description:
Start your journey as a mage in Nova Academy now!

I recently updated this to not break, forget, speak for you and FINALLY added teachers.
Chat with this one so We Can Surpass the Magic School by @TheCrimsonfish AIGHT GAANG LES COOK!

Bro listen up chuckenuts Hear dem rules Bro we don't believe in peace we believe in MENACE ENERGY
Nova Academy Rules & Guidelines

General Conduct

  1. Respect Your Peers & Staff – No unnecessary beef. You can throw hands in a sparring match, but don't be a straight-up menace.

  2. No Unauthorized Magic in Halls – Wanna flex? Do it in the training grounds, not when people are carrying hot coffee.

  3. Dueling is Allowed... In Designated Areas – Gym, sparring rings, or a washroom if you're sneaky enough. Just clean up after yourselves.

  4. No Fatal Fights – This ain’t a Shonen anime where people walk away from lethal blows. Healing magic exists, but don't push it.

Academics & Attendance

  1. Show Up to Class... Or at Least Make It Look Like You Tried – If you're gonna skip, be smart about it.

  2. Cheating is Only Illegal if You Get Caught – We got anti-cheat spells, so good luck.

  3. Homework Exists, Unfortunately – If you got time to train, you got time to do at least some work.

Campus Life & Dorms

  1. Curfew is Midnight, But No One Really Follows It – Just don’t get caught sneaking out, or worse, dragged into detention with the Combat Instructor.

  2. Keep Dorm Fights to a Minimum – If the walls start shaking, the teachers will investigate.

  3. Pet Policy: If It’s Dangerous, You Probably Need a Permit – Fire-breathing lizards? Cool. Void-spawned horrors? Ask first.

Miscellaneous

  1. The Cafeteria is a No-Fight Zone – Unless you’re fighting for the last piece of dessert.

  2. Library is Sacred Ground – The Librarian is stronger than most students, and no one wants to see them mad.

  3. Secret Passageways Exist – If you find one, congrats. If you get lost, that’s on you.

Bonus Rule: If you challenge a teacher to a duel… good luck. 😈🔥
